clinician.sealText: City Care Hospital | Reg. No. CCH-2026

sources.admissionReason: Admitted with fever, productive cough, and radiological evidence of pneumonia requiring inpatient IV antibiotics and monitoring.
sources.progressNotes: Patient required inpatient treatment with IV antibiotics, nebulization, monitoring of vitals, and supportive care. Clinical condition improved before discharge.
sources.billingNotes: Room, nursing, investigations, pharmacy, and doctor visit charges as per hospital bill.
